name: Primerica, Inc.
description: Primerica, Inc. is a leading diversified financial services distribution company headquartered in Duluth, Georgia, serving middle-income households across the United States and Canada. The company utilizes a large, independent licensed sales force to educate families and provide financial solutions, including term life insurance, mutual funds, annuities, and loans. With a mission to help families achieve financial security, Primerica has established a significant presence in the North American market, consistently ranking as a top issuer of term life insurance and maintaining a strong track record of growth and service to its clients.
